metadata.title: nu3 - Nutrition and support for families in Colombia
metadata.description: Colombian foundation with over 20 years transforming lives through nutrition, education, and comprehensive support for vulnerable families.

cta.transform: I want to transform a life today

slide1.subtitle: Together We Change Lives
slide1.title: Empowering Hope Through Giving
slide1.description: Over 20 years transforming lives with nutrition, education and comprehensive support for vulnerable families in Colombia.

slide2.subtitle: Nutrition For All
slide2.title: Building Healthy Futures
slide2.description: Comprehensive programs that guarantee adequate nutrition and optimal development for children, mothers and elderly adults.

slide3.subtitle: Transform a Life Today
slide3.title: Your Support Makes the Difference
slide3.description: With your monthly sponsorship you guarantee nutrition, education and continuous support for those who need it most.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: A Colombian foundation committed to nutritional well-being
about.description: With over 20 years of experience, we support vulnerable families through our 360° Intervention Model that integrates nutrition, education, entrepreneurship, and employability.
about.missionText: To improve the quality of life of children, expectant mothers, and elderly people in vulnerable conditions through comprehensive nutrition and support programs.
about.visionText: To be the leading foundation in Colombia in transforming lives through replicable and sustainable nutritional intervention models.

catering.title: Menu3 - Social Catering
catering.description: Large scale catering with social impact

model360.title: Our 360° Intervention Model
model360.subtitle: A comprehensive approach that transforms lives
model360.description: We work with children, expectant and breastfeeding mothers, and elderly adults through a proven, measurable, and replicable model.

programs.title: Nutrition and support programs
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for every stage of life

malnutrition.title: Malnutrition prevention
malnutrition.description: We identify and address cases of child malnutrition through nutritional screening, balanced nutrition, and continuous monitoring.

childhood.title: Early childhood nutrition
childhood.description: We ensure optimal development for children under 5 with proper nutrition and early stimulation.

mothers.title: Comprehensive support for expectant and breastfeeding mothers
mothers.description: We support mothers during pregnancy and breastfeeding with nutrition, psychosocial support, and rights education.

elderly.title: Elderly support
elderly.description: We ensure adequate nutritional status for elderly adults, improving their quality of life and well-being.

gardens.title: Productive gardens and food security
gardens.subtitle: Cultivating Souls - Sowing hope, harvesting the future
gardens.description: We train families in growing fruits and vegetables, promoting food security and income generation.

catering.title: Social catering
catering.description: Large-scale kitchen that generates employment for beneficiary mothers and reinvests in our Integral Centers.

bakery.title: Industrial bakery
bakery.description: Production of bread and baked goods with social impact, generating employment opportunities.

sewing.title: Sewing and training
sewing.description: Sewing training for women, strengthening employability and income generation.

recycling.title: Goods recovery
recycling.description: We receive and sell donations of clothes and goods, reinvesting in social programs.

sponsor.title: Sponsor a life
sponsor.subtitle: Your constant support transforms realities
sponsor.description: With your monthly sponsorship, you guarantee nutrition, education, and continuous support for those who need it most.

section.subtitle: Help & Donate
section.title: Inspiring and Helping for a Better Lifestyle

prevencion-desnutricion.title: Malnutrition prevention in Colombian children
prevencion-desnutricion.description: We work together to make a lasting difference, helping people with kindness and hard work

primera-infancia.title: Nutritional care for early childhood
primera-infancia.description: We ensure optimal development for children under 5 with adequate nutrition

madres-gestantes.title: Comprehensive support for expectant and breastfeeding mothers
madres-gestantes.description: We support mothers in their process with nutrition and rights education

adultos-mayores.title: Nutrition program for elderly adults
adultos-mayores.description: We ensure adequate nutritional status improving quality of life

huertas-productivas.title: Productive gardens - Food security
huertas-productivas.description: We train families in cultivation promoting food security

donation.title: Donate and transform lives
donation.subtitle: Every contribution counts
donation.description: Your donation becomes nutritious food, education programs, and support for vulnerable families.

volunteer.title: Become A Volunteer
volunteer.description: Your time and talent can transform the lives of hundreds of families. Join our team and be part of the change that Colombia needs.

donate.title: Send a Gift For Children's
donate.description: Every donation translates into nutrition, education, and hope for the children and families who need it most.

partners.title: Partners and allies
partners.subtitle: Together for a better-nourished Colombia
partners.description: We develop strategic partnerships with companies committed to social responsibility and the Sustainable Development Goals.

jornada-nutricional-2024.title: Nutritional Assessment and Follow-up Day
jornada-nutricional-2024.description: Free nutritional assessment for children and vulnerable families. Includes personalized consultation and meal plan.

taller-huertas-productivas.title: Practical Workshop on Productive Gardens
taller-huertas-productivas.description: Learn organic farming techniques and how to grow nutritious foods for your family.

capacitacion-madres-lactantes.title: Training for Pregnant and Breastfeeding Mothers
capacitacion-madres-lactantes.description: Informative session on nutrition during pregnancy and breastfeeding, baby care and rights.

feria-alimentos-saludables.title: Healthy Foods and Nutritious Recipes Fair
feria-alimentos-saludables.description: Display of nutritious dishes, economical recipes and tips for a balanced diet.

section.subtitle: Help & Donate
section.title: Inspiring and Helping for a Better Lifestyle

testimonial1.text: Thanks to nu3, my son regained his weight and is now healthy and happy. The support was fundamental for our family.
testimonial1.name: Andrea Pérez

testimonial2.text: The productive gardens program changed our lives. We now grow our own food and generate income.
testimonial2.name: Pedro Morales

testimonial3.text: As a company, we found in nu3 a transparent and committed ally. Seeing the direct impact of our donations is inspiring.
testimonial3.name: Laura Jiménez

testimonial4.text: The support during my pregnancy was invaluable. I received nutrition, training and much love from the nu3 team.
testimonial4.name: Carolina Ruiz

testimonial5.text: Being a volunteer at nu3 allowed me to contribute from my skills and be part of a real transformation in my community.
testimonial5.name: David Torres

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here to listen
contact.description: Do you have questions about our programs or want to be part of the change? Write to us.

footer.description: Colombian foundation with over 20 years transforming lives through nutrition and comprehensive support.
